notes: SureColor S-series uses UltraChrome GS3 true-solvent ink with dual PrecisionCore TFP printheads. Markets 'no special ventilation required' as a differentiator vs older true-solvent machines.
Eco-solvent pioneer; Eco-Sol MAX 2 ink is GREENGUARD Gold certified. Roland DG spun out of Roland Corporation (musical instruments) in 1981.
CJV300 Plus is an integrated print+cut machine; runs eco/mild-solvent (SS21) or dye-sublimation inks. SS21 mild solvent meets Nordic Swan Ecolabel chemical requirements.
ValueJet line runs Eco-Ultra / Universal Mild Solvent (UMS) inks; sources state the inks 'do not spread harmful VOCs'. Staggered dual-head design.
